title: Opening for Store Manager at Cello Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Cello Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Cello Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cello Asia Pacific Associates:
Cello Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cello Asia Pacific Associates!
jsonLd.skills: Customer Service, Supply Chain, POS Systems, Inventory Management, Planogram, Retail Analytics, Loss Prevention, KPI Management
